title: berula angustifolia var. gracile
intro: Berula angustifolia var. gracile, also known as water celery, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae that is commonly found in wet environments. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Berula angustifolia var. gracile include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for use in herbal remedies, or as a culinary ingredient in salads and soups.
